title: Giới từ (3) — Tính từ đi với giới từ
summary: Tổng hợp các cụm Adj + Preposition thường gặp: Adj + to, of, for, at, with, in, from, about, on.

sections.title: Adj + to / Adj + of
sections.body:
## Tính từ đi với giới từ (Phần 1)

### Adj + to

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **acceptable to** | có thể chấp nhận | *Is this proposal acceptable to you?* |
| **accustomed to** | quen với (thường dùng get/be accustomed to) | *I soon got accustomed to his strange ways.* |
| **agreeable to** | có thể đồng ý, thích hợp với | *He said the terms were not agreeable to him.* |
| **applicable to** | có thể ứng dụng | *The results of experiments on animals will be applicable to human beings.* |
| **appropriate to** | thích hợp | *It's necessary for the homicide to incur a punishment appropriate to his cruelties.* |
| **addicted to** | say mê cái gì, nghiện | *Children are often addicted to fairy stories.* |
| **bad to** | có hại cho, không tốt cho | *Staying up late is bad to us.* |
| **contrary to** | trái với | *Contrary to his expectations, he found the atmosphere exciting.* |
| **clear to** | rõ ràng | *You could see clear to the bottom of the lagoon.* |
| **close to** | gần | *He spent close to 30 years in jail.* |
| **dedicated/devoted to** | hiến dâng, tận tụy | *I am dedicated to making this world a better place. / She is devoted to her job.* |
| **engaged to** | đính hôn với | *She was engaged to a lecturer.* |
| **equal to** | đủ sức, đủ khả năng gánh vác | *I just don't feel equal to the challenge that I'm facing now.* |
| **essential to/for** | cần thiết | *Food is essential to/for life.* |
| **harmful to** | có hại | *Smoking is harmful to health.* |
| **faithful/loyal to** | trung thành | *He remained faithful to the ideals of the party. / These brave soldiers are always loyal to their ideal.* |
| **grateful/thankful to sb for st** | biết ơn ai về điều gì | *I'm grateful/thankful to you for all your help.* |
| **important to sb** | quan trọng đối với ai | *It's important to me that you should be there.* |
| **indifferent to** | thờ ơ, lãnh đạm | *The government cannot afford to be indifferent to public opinion.* |
| **kind to sb** | tử tế với ai | *He was very kind to me when the children were ill.* |
| **likely to** | có khả năng, có thể thích hợp | *He is not likely to come now.* |
| **married to** | kết hôn với | *Ali is married to Salma.* |
| **necessary to** | cần thiết, thiết yếu | *Sleeping is necessary to health.* |
| **open to** | cởi mở | *The system is open to abuse.* |
| **opposed to** | bất đồng, phản đối | *He was bitterly opposed to the war.* |
| **polite to** | lịch sự với ai | *You must be more polite to the customers.* |
| **related to** | liên quan đến | *He was related to that crime.* |
| **responsible to sb** | chịu trách nhiệm trước ai | *The head of state is responsible to his people and must obey the law.* |
| **similar to** | tương tự | *Your hat is similar to mine.* |
| **sensitive to/about** | nhạy cảm | *She is very sensitive to other people's feelings.* |
| **used to** | quen với | *I'm used to getting up early.* |

### Adj + of

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **afraid of** | sợ hãi | *Are you afraid of snakes?* |
| **ashamed of** | xấu hổ, bối rối về | *She was deeply ashamed of her behaviour at the party.* |
| **aware of** | nhận thức về cái gì | *He was well aware of the problem. (Trái nghĩa: unaware of)* |
| **capable of** | có khả năng làm gì | *He is capable of anything if it furthers his ambition.* |
| **careful of/with/about** | cẩn thận | *He was very careful of his reputation.* |
| **certain of/about** | chắc chắn về | *You don't seem too certain of it.* |
| **characteristic of** | đặc trưng cho tính cách ai/vật gì | *Enthusiasm is characteristic of him.* |
| **conscious of** | nhận thức, chú ý đến | *She's very conscious of the problems involved.* |
| **desirous of** | khao khát | *The Pope was desirous of peace in Europe.* |
| **doubtful of/about** | nghi ngờ | *I was doubtful of my judgement.* |
| **envious/jealous of** | ghen tị | *He was envious of the local boys. / Other girls were jealous of her good looks.* |
| **fond of** | ưa thích, thích | *I'm fond of cooking.* |
| **frightened of** | sợ hãi | *I've always been frightened of snakes.* |
| **full of** | đầy | *The bin is full of rubbish.* |
| **guilty of** | có tội, cảm thấy có lỗi | *She was guilty of a serious error of judgement.* |
| **hopeful of/about** | hy vọng | *She is hopeful of returning to work soon.* |
| **incapable of** | không có khả năng | *Professors who seem incapable of any original thought.* |
| **innocent of** | vô tội, ngây thơ | *She was found innocent of any crime.* |
| **independent of** | độc lập, không lệ thuộc | *The study is totally independent of central government.* |
| **nervous of/about** | lo lắng | *He's always been a little nervous of speaking in public.* |
| **proud of** | tự hào về | *They are proud of their daughter.* |
| **respectful of/for** | lễ phép, tôn trọng | *I'm respectful of your opinion.* |
| **be/get rid of** | tống khứ, loại bỏ | *We got rid of all the old furniture.* |
| **sick of** | chán ngấy | *I'm sick of waiting around like this.* |
| **scared of** | sợ hãi | *All small children are scared of ghosts.* |
| **sure of** | chắc chắn | *I'm not sure of the results.* |
| **suspicious of/about** | nghi ngờ | *He was suspicious of/about her motives.* |
| **tired of** | mệt mỏi, chán vì việc gì | *I am tired of studying all the time.* |
| **terrified of** | khiếp sợ | *I'm terrified of spiders.* |
| **typical of** | điển hình | *This meal is typical of local cookery.* |
| **unaware of** | không nhận thức được | *He was unaware of my presence.* |

sections.title: Adj + for / Adj + at / Adj + with
sections.body:
## Tính từ đi với giới từ (Phần 2)

### Adj + for

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **anxious for sb about st** | lo lắng cho ai về điều gì | *Parents are naturally anxious for their children.* |
| **appreciated for** | được đánh giá cao vì | *I was appreciated for my help.* |
| **available for** | có sẵn, sẵn sàng cho | *The Prime Minister was not available for comment.* |
| **bad for** | có hại cho | *Staying up late is bad for our health.* |
| **convenient for** | thuận tiện cho | *Will it be convenient for you to start work tomorrow?* |
| **difficult for** | khó khăn đối với | *The questions are too difficult for the children.* |
| **eager for** | hào hứng, khao khát | *I am eager for my next trip.* |
| **eligible for** | đủ điều kiện cho | *Only those over 70 are eligible for the special payment.* |
| **enough for** | đủ cho | *Have we got enough sandwiches for lunch?* |
| **important for** | quan trọng cho | *Oxygen is important for our lives.* |
| **famous for** | nổi tiếng vì | *Hanoi is famous for 'pho'.* |
| **grateful/thankful for st** | biết ơn vì điều gì | *I was grateful for the light so I could see.* |
| **late for** | trễ, muộn | *He was ten minutes late for school.* |
| **necessary for** | cần thiết cho | *She hasn't the experience necessary for the job.* |
| **perfect for** | hoàn hảo cho | *This dress would be perfect for my date.* |
| **prepared for st** | sẵn sàng, chuẩn bị cho | *The troops were being prepared for battle.* |
| **qualified for** | đủ khả năng, điều kiện | *He is qualified for this dangerous mission.* |
| **responsible for st/V-ing** | chịu trách nhiệm về | *You must be responsible for paying these bills.* |
| **ready for** | sẵn sàng cho | *I'm ready for the exam.* |
| **sorry for** | lấy làm tiếc, hối hận vì | *Aren't you sorry for what you've done?* |
| **suitable for** | thích hợp cho | *This programme is not suitable for children.* |
| **sufficient for** | đầy đủ cho nhu cầu | *A small income which was sufficient for her needs.* |

### Adj + at

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **amazed/astonished at/by** | ngạc nhiên vì | *My parents looked astonished at my news.* |
| **amused at/by** | thích thú, buồn cười vì | *Everyone is amused at/by the clown's gestures.* |
| **angry at/about st** | tức giận về việc gì | *I was very angry at how rainy it was.* |
| **annoyed at/about st** | bực mình vì cái gì | *He was annoyed at my carelessness.* |
| **bad at** | dốt, tệ về môn gì | *I'm bad at Maths.* |
| **clever at** | thông minh, khéo léo về | *She's clever at getting what she wants.* |
| **delighted at/by/with** | vui vẻ, hài lòng về | *She was delighted by/at the news of the wedding.* |
| **excellent at** | xuất sắc về | *My teacher is excellent at English.* |
| **furious at** | giận dữ về việc gì | *They were furious at not being invited.* |
| **good at** | giỏi về | *I'm good at English.* |
| **hopeless at** | vô vọng, rất kém | *I'm hopeless at science.* |
| **lucky at** | may mắn trong việc gì | *I'm lucky at winning this trip.* |
| **proficient in/at** | thành thạo về | *I was proficient at my job.* |
| **quick at** | nhanh nhạy trong việc gì | *He is quick at solving mathematical problems.* |
| **slow at** | chậm chạp đưa ra quyết định/làm gì | *She is slow at making up her mind.* |
| **shocked at/by** | sốc vì | *I was shocked at the news of her death.* |
| **skillful at** | khéo léo, tài giỏi về | *He is skillful at inventing excuses.* |
| **surprised at/by** | ngạc nhiên vì | *We were surprised at your behavior.* |

### Adj + with

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **acquainted with** | quen với cái gì | *The students are already acquainted with the work of Shakespeare.* |
| **associated with** | liên kết, cộng tác với | *He no longer wished to be associated with the party's policy.* |
| **annoyed with sb at/about st** | khó chịu với ai về việc gì | *Kelly was annoyed with him.* |
| **bored/fed up with** | chán ngấy | *I'm bored with my job. / I got fed up with his constant complaining.* |
| **busy with** | bận rộn với | *They were busy with preparations for their wedding.* |
| **content with** | bằng lòng, hài lòng với | *She seemed quite content with her results.* |
| **careful with** | cẩn thận với | *Please be careful with my glasses.* |
| **connected with** | kết nối, liên quan với | *The fall in sales is connected with the decline in employment.* |
| **crowded/packed with** | đông đúc, đầy | *a room crowded with books.* |
| **disappointed with/at/by/in** | thất vọng về/với | *I was very disappointed with myself. / I'm disappointed in you.* |
| **dissatisfied with** | không hài lòng với | *He has been very dissatisfied with his life.* |
| **delighted with** | vui sướng với | *I was delighted with my presents.* |
| **familiar with** | quen thuộc, am hiểu | *He is familiar with me.* |
| **friendly with** | thân thiện với | *I am very friendly with the people.* |
| **generous with** | rộng rãi, hào phóng với | *To be generous with your time.* |
| **gentle with** | ôn hòa, lịch thiệp với | *He is gentle with women and children.* |
| **involved with** | liên quan, có quan hệ tình cảm với | *Angela told me she was involved with someone else.* |
| **pleased with** | hài lòng với | *I'm very pleased with the results.* |
| **patient with** | nhẫn nại với | *Susan's very patient with the children.* |
| **popular with** | được yêu thích bởi (số đông) | *These policies are unlikely to prove popular with voters.* |
| **satisfied with** | thỏa mãn, hài lòng với | *He felt satisfied with his job.* |
| **troubled with** | bồn chồn, lo lắng về | *Don't be troubled with that.* |
| **wrong with** | có vấn đề, sai sót với | *There's something wrong with the printer.* |

sections.title: Adj + in / from / about / on
sections.body:
## Tính từ đi với giới từ (Phần 3)

### Adj + in

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **experienced in** | có kinh nghiệm về | *He's very experienced in looking after animals.* |
| **honest in** | trung thực trong việc gì | *Always be honest in whatever you do.* |
| **involved in** | liên quan đến, tham gia vào | *We need to examine all the costs involved in the project. / I was so involved in my book...* |
| **interested in** | quan tâm, hứng thú | *I'm interested in football.* |
| **proficient in/at** | thành thạo | *She felt reasonably proficient in Italian.* |
| **rich in** | giàu, chứa nhiều (chất dinh dưỡng...) | *Many vegetables and fruits are rich in vitamins.* |
| **successful in** | thành công trong | *Finally, they were successful in putting out the fire.* |
| **weak in** | yếu, kém về môn gì | *He is the student who is weak in algebra.* |

### Adj + from

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **absent from** | vắng mặt ở | *Most pupils were absent from school at least once.* |
| **derived from** | bắt nguồn từ | *The word 'fiction' is derived from the Greek 'fictus'.* |
| **different from** | khác với | *Their tastes are different from mine.* |
| **distinct from** | khác biệt hoàn toàn | *Man is distinct from animals.* |
| **free of/from** | không chứa hoặc không bị ảnh hưởng bởi thứ xấu | *free from difficulty/doubt/fear / free from artificial colours.* |
| **far from** | cách xa | *My house is far from my school.* |
| **isolated/separate from** | tách biệt, cô lập khỏi | *He was isolated from all the other prisoners. / kept entirely separate from the other.* |

### Adj + about

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **anxious about sth/for sb** | lo lắng về việc gì | *He seemed anxious about the meeting.* |
| **confused about** | bối rối, nhầm lẫn về | *She was utterly confused about what had happened.* |
| **careful about** | cẩn thận về | *I'm very careful about washing my hands before eating.* |
| **concerned about** | băn khoăn, quan tâm về | *The President is deeply concerned about this issue.* |
| **crazy about** | điên cuồng, cực kỳ thích | *It's pretty obvious he's crazy about you.* |
| **certain about/of** | chắc chắn về | *You don't seem too certain about it.* |
| **curious about** | tò mò, hiếu kỳ về | *She was curious about what had happened.* |
| **doubtful about** | hoài nghi | *Rosy was doubtful about the whole idea.* |
| **excited about** | hứng thú, phấn khích | *I'm very excited about the news.* |
| **enthusiastic about** | nhiệt tình, hứng thú | *You don't sound very enthusiastic about the idea.* |
| **glad about** | vui mừng về | *She wasn't going to leave, and he was glad about that.* |
| **happy about/with** | hạnh phúc, hài lòng | *If there's anything you're not happy about, come and ask.* |
| **hopeful of/about** | hy vọng về | *He is not very hopeful about the outcome of the interview.* |
| **nervous of/about** | lo lắng về | *She was nervous about walking home so late.* |
| **optimistic/pessimistic about** | lạc quan/bi quan về | *Peter is not optimistic about the outcome. / Doctors are pessimistic about his recovery.* |
| **serious about** | nghiêm túc về | *I'm serious about my work.* |
| **suspicious of/about** | nghi ngờ | *I'm always suspicious about his kindness.* |
| **upset about** | buồn bã, thất vọng về | *I was upset about losing my money.* |
| **worried about** | lo lắng về | *He is always worried about his wife.* |

### Adj + on

| Cụm từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **based on** | dựa trên | *This novel is based on a real story.* |
| **dependent on** | phụ thuộc vào | *Success is dependent on how hard you work.* |
| **keen on** | thích thú | *The kids are mad keen on computer games.* |

exercises.question: Thank you for all your help. You’ve been very kind ……….. me
I don't think that I'm acquainted .......... him
What have I done wrong ? Why are you annoyed .... me?
Opening the parcel, he was surprised ……what he saw.
Rosy married a wealthy man. She got married ….him last June.
Don’t be familiar ………. John. He is a dishonest man.
My plan is similar …….yours, but it is different …… Ken’s
It was very nice .... you to do my shopping for me. Thank you very much
I’m capable ………….. speaking two languages
Contrary ………… his doctor’s orders, he has gone back to work
I‘ve been trying to learn Spanish but I’m not very satisfied .... my progress.
Attending all the lectures is important ……… us
The United States became independent …………… England in 1776.
We were grateful……….. our friends ………. all the assistance
You know that stealing is wrong! You should feel ashamed ………… yourself!
He is jealous….. his rival’s success.
I am very opposed ………..your going abroad.
She is indifferent …….. life.
Although his last name is the same as mine, I’m not related ……. him
You’ll find that this tool is very useful…………many different things.
The students are very anxious ……..the results of the examination
The clerk said she was tired …………hearing complaints day after day.
George is still very loyal ….his friends despite their argument
A good basic knowledge of English is essential……. advanced work
I think Martha was pleased …..the gift I gave her for her birthday.
We’re still hopeful …………. hearing from our friends before Saturday.
I’m conscious ……..their feelings, but I’m afraid ………….offending them
Mr. Anderson is responsible ………hiring and firing employees.
I didn’t expect to win the match. I was quite surprised…..the result.
At present, my daily expenses are just about equal ………my income.
Once scientist fully understand the cause_______a disease, it becomes easier for them to find a cure for it
The children in this deprived area show a real thirst________learning
It was his contribution______molecular biology that won him the Nobel prize
I am standing here_______ my friends
_________, I had a happy childhood
I can’t open this door. Have you got a key____ the other door?
I emailed Jim last week, but I still haven’t received a reply____ my message
_____ our friendly staff, you’ll find our hotel provides everything you could ever desire.
He is decorating the house .............. selling it
The project failed_________finiancial banking
You can’t talk to her now. She’s still_____, but I will ask her to call you back.
To be.....debt is to be .......danger
our style of hair maybe_______ date at present.
There was a rise______ the demand______ smoke alarms that week.
Donata came across the business idea______ accident!
______mistake, I took the wrong book from my desk this morning.
The main reason ...........taking the course is to improve your language skills
He noticed an increase_______ the curiosity of his neighbors after the burned cake incident.
Would you like to come______ a walk with me?
Where would you like to go______holiday this year?
____my opinion, he is an excellent pianist
Let's drive today. I think the bus drivers are______ strike.
The washing machine is............again. Let's buy a new one.
The reasons______ homelessness are many, but there is a great demand_____ a plan of action to end it.
I go to cinema______times
These jackets are ____ fashion
It wasn’t a bad accident. The damage _____ the car wasn’t serious
She recently overcome her fear____ flying and had a holiday in South Africa
She has no faith_____modern medicine.
A large number________seats have been taken.
He took a photograph______ his girlfriend.
Do you have a good relationship_______ most of your relatives?
She has a great deal of experience_________ introducing new products to international markets.
His fear _____flying made travel difficult.
Did you send Alice an invitation______ the party?
His habit_____ smoking in restaurants caused many problems in California.
The company has strong links______big inventors
The search_____the missing teenager was called off
The decrease _profits is due to the bad market.
There is a real demand_____ qualified English teachers.
Who is______all these dogs? They seem to be running wild!
We have seen a fall _ prices recently.
The cause_____ his problems is his wife.
Did you do any damage_____ the car?
I think your attitude____ your employer is very bad indeed.
She is_____ holiday now. Can you phone her at 0261.321.578.
There is a great need______ low-cost housing in this country as an answer______ the homeless problem.
His addiction_____ surfing the Internet is a problem.
Her anxiety______ speaking in public caused her to lose the job.
His belief______ god is influenced by his mother.
His dedication_______ teaching was impressive.
The delay_____ processing the visa caused problems.
______________saying the wrong thing, I chose to say nothing at all
His fear _____flying made travel difficult.
Her fondness____ traveling led to her career in the travel industry.
His habit_____ smoking in restaurants caused many problems in California.
Her career as a pilot evolved out of her interest______ flying.
Her knowledge______ climbing helped her during the competition.
His love______ singing developed when he was a child.
Their memories_______ traveling in Africa will stay with them forever.
The process______ painting such a large mural is more complicated than you might think.
His reaction_____ winning the prize was quite funny.
We’ll send you a reply____your application letter next Monday
I’m sure we’ll find a solution______this problem
Do you have an answer_____this question?
There is clearly a difference______your car and mine
We don’t have room _____a grand piano?
I’m against any form of cruelty_____ animals
I’m sorry; I wasn’t paying close attention ____ what you said
Don’t put much confidence_____ his words
There is no need_________a new car at the moment
Have you had any contact________Sarah?
She has great interest___________the poetry of Donne
I have no faith_______ her capabilities
In many cities the cost _____ living is pretty high.
My new job is making great demands____ my time
Jane had the idea_____starting her own business.
Workers often go on strike when their salaries don’t keep pace with increases____the cost
English is an example______a language that stresses content words within sentence
The advantage______having free time is that you can do anything you want with it
